Lines.Text: Climb to the top of the structure. Go west until the catwalk ends. There's a section of wall that doesn't read as a wall to most units. Stand at it and check. Don't walk past it. It will not announce itself.

Through it there's a hidden teleporter. The Cartel doesn't broadcast its location, for obvious reasons. It leads to a cache. Rifle, ammunition. Use it to kill fucking Eddie, bring me the keycard when it's done.
